payload.answer: Duplicate Slack retry detected; no new memory committed.
citations: For context, Same Slack event ID delivered twice for: Sam from Goldman likes Bill Evans.

entity_resolution.reason: The same Slack event ID was delivered twice, so this intake should not create or modify durable memory. The underlying entities and preference are also ambiguous without further resolution.

details: Detected duplicate delivery of the same Slack event ID.
Suppressed duplicate write to avoid storing the same memory twice.
No entity resolution or durable memory creation performed on the retry.

repair_options: Ignore the retried event because the Slack event ID was already processed.
If the original delivery was not actually persisted, process the event exactly once with idempotency tracking.
If capturing the underlying claim later, resolve which Sam, which Goldman, and which Bill Evans are intended before writing durable memory.
